heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 12402 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $3,000,000 for fiscal years 2023 through 2027.
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle F of title IV of , , , which enacted this part, amended , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure, and enacted provisions set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–322108 Stat. 1950section 534 of Title 28section 534 of Title 28Sept. 13, 1994
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14032 of Title 42

Amendments2022— substituted “2023 through 2027” for “2014 through 2018”.Pub. L. 117–1032013— substituted “$3,000,000 for fiscal years 2014 through 2018.” for “$3,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2007 through 2011.”Pub. L. 113–42006—, which directed substitution of “2011” for “2006”, was executed by substituting “2011” for “2005” to reflect the probable intent of Congress, because “2006” does not appear in text.Pub. L. 109–162, § 109(2), substituted “2007” for “2001”.Pub. L. 109–162, § 109(1)2000— reenacted section catchline without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part—Pub. L. 106–386“(1) $1,500,000 for fiscal year 1996;“(2) $1,750,000 for fiscal year 1997; and“(3) $2,750,000 for fiscal year 1998.”

Effective Date of 2022 AmendmentAmendment by not effective until Oct. 1 of the first fiscal year beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under , Commerce and Trade.Pub. L. 117–103section 4(a) of div. W of Pub. L. 117–103section 6851 of Title 15Mar. 15, 2022
